This was so bad. Started well, seemed to be a straightforward generic plot but with a lot of guns and violence which was great but the whole of that last chase to the fight was absolutely horrendous. I’m not taking about the filming or the actual fight scenes, it’s just bad writing. 
“SPOILER WARNING”
Although they did the whole secret forces thing quite well, they defo just made them out to be complete idiots at some points. Firstly as soon as they realised they were being tracked they should’ve disposed of their phones, instead of waiting till the antagonists knew where their final destination was. Then in the final scene the idiot they call tank literally walked out of the building into no cover just to throw an explosive.😂😂 of course bro got shot. Then he also jumped into the hole with a Granada instead of just throwing it down like a normal person. That was the most forced death I’ve ever seen. Normal people aren’t just trying to die. Then at the end they just all walked out in the open knowing full well there was some people hiding behind the logs. Of course they got shot again and another one died. Do they not know how to flank or do they just not have any self preservation instincts.😅 And finally there was the last fight. Bro I thought I was in a medieval knights movie when bro dropped the gun and said, I have honour or something stupid like that and decide to throw hands.😂😂 I swear the villain who just killed one of the team in front of the captain didn’t even die in the end, like wth? Also ending was way too brief and we didn’t see the bad guys getting retribution. Basically it’s good… if you ignore all common sense and just focus on the fighting.😂😂
